# nbdev_2026

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install nbdev_2026 in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure nbdev_2026 package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to nbdev_2026
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/msalazarcgeo/nbdev_2026):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/msalazarcgeo/nbdev_2026.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/msalazarcgeo/nbdev_2026)

``` sh
$ conda install -c msalazarcgeo nbdev_2026
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/nbdev_2026/)

``` sh
$ pip install nbdev_2026
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/msalazarcgeo/nbdev_2026)’s
[pages](https://msalazarcgeo.github.io/nbdev_2026/). Additionally you
can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/msalazarcgeo/nbdev_2026) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/nbdev_2026/) respectively.
